Rohit Sharma Role Shapes Abhishek Sharma’s T20 Identity

Jan 24, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Rohit Sharma Role Shapes Abhishek Sharma’s T20 Identity

The role once played by Rohit Sharma has become the foundation of Abhishek Sharma’s explosive rise in Indian T20 cricket.

The young opener revealed that head coach Gautam Gambhir and captain Suryakumar Yadav encouraged him to follow the aggressive template once set by the former skipper, particularly during the powerplay overs, helping him carve a distinct T20 identity for himself on the international stage.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Rohit Sharma Role Shapes Abhishek Sharma’s T20 Identity
